import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { useNavigate, useLocation } from "react-router-dom"; import { authService } from "../services"; import Sidebar from "../components/Sidebar"; import { getAdminMenuItems } from "../config/menuConfig"; import { LineChart, Line, BarChart, Bar, PieChart, Pie, Cell, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer, } from "recharts"; import { FiTrendingUp, FiBox, FiUsers, FiActivity, FiCheck, FiClock, FiAlertCircle, } from "react-icons/fi"; import "../styles/Dashboard.css"; // Sample data const loadDataByDay = [ { day: "Mon", loads: 24, completed: 20 }, { day: "Tue", loads: 34, completed: 28 }, { day: "Wed", loads: 28, completed: 24 }, { day: "Thu", loads: 42, completed: 35 }, { day: "Fri", loads: 38, completed: 32 }, { day: "Sat", loads: 32, completed: 28 }, { day: "Sun", loads: 18, completed: 16 }, ]; const loadStatusData = [ { name: "Completed", value: 183, color: "#10b981" }, { name: "Pending", value: 45, color: "#f59e0b" }, { name: "In Progress", value: 32, color: "#3b82f6" }, { name: "Cancelled", value: 8, color: "#ef4444" }, ]; // Weight data (in tons) const weightData = [ { day: "Mon", weight: 2400, capacity: 3000 }, { day: "Tue", weight: 3240, capacity: 3000 }, { day: "Wed", weight: 2800, capacity: 3000 }, { day: "Thu", weight: 4200, capacity: 3000 }, { day: "Fri", weight: 3800, capacity: 3000 }, { day: "Sat", weight: 3200, capacity: 3000 }, { day: "Sun", weight: 1800, capacity: 3000 }, ]; // Price data (in USD) const priceData = [ { day: "Mon", price: 12400, revenue: 14500 }, { day: "Tue", price: 16200, revenue: 18900 }, { day: "Wed", price: 14000, revenue: 16200 }, { day: "Thu", price: 21000, revenue: 24500 }, { day: "Fri", price: 19000, revenue: 22100 }, { day: "Sat", price: 16000, revenue: 18600 }, { day: "Sun", price: 9000, revenue: 10500 }, ]; const recentLoadsTable = [ { id: 1, loadId: "#L001", origin: "New York", destination: "Boston", status: "Completed", distance: "215 km", date: "2024-02-20", }, { id: 2, loadId: "#L002", origin: "Boston", destination: "Philadelphia", status: "In Progress", distance: "385 km", date: "2024-02-21", }, { id: 3, loadId: "#L003", origin: "Philadelphia", destination: "Washington DC", status: "Pending", distance: "225 km", date: "2024-02-22", }, { id: 4, loadId: "#L004", origin: "Washington DC", destination: "Atlanta", status: "Completed", distance: "635 km", date: "2024-02-22", }, { id: 5, loadId: "#L005", origin: "Atlanta", destination: "Miami", status: "In Progress", distance: "1100 km", date: "2024-02-23", }, ]; const getStatusColor = (status) => { const colors = { Completed: "#10b981", "In Progress": "#3b82f6", Pending: "#f59e0b", Cancelled: "#ef4444", }; return colors[status] || "#6b7280"; }; const StatPanel = ({ icon: Icon, title, value, subtitle, color }) => (

{title}

{value}

{subtitle}

); const AdminDashboard = () => { const user = authService.getCurrentUser(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const location = useLocation(); const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true); const handleLogout = () => { authService.logout(); navigate("/admin/login"); }; const menuItems = getAdminMenuItems(navigate); const isActive = (path) => location.pathname === path; return (
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Welcome Header */}

Welcome Back, {user?.name}!

Here's what's happening with your loads today.

{/* Statistics Panels */}
{/* Charts Section */}
{/* Line Chart - Loads Over Time */}

Load Activity

Weekly statistics
{/* Pie Chart - Load Status Distribution */}

Load Status

Distribution
`${name}: ${value}`} outerRadius={100} fill="#8884d8" dataKey="value" > {loadStatusData.map((entry, index) => ( ))}
{/* Bar Chart - Distance Statistics */}

Distance Covered

Miles by day
{/* Line Chart - Weight Analysis */}

Load Weight Analysis

Capacity utilization (tons)
{/* Bar Chart - Price Analysis */}

Revenue Analysis

Price vs Revenue (USD)
{/* Data Table Section */}

Recent Loads

{recentLoadsTable.map((load) => ( ))}
Load ID Origin Destination Distance Status Date Action
{load.loadId} {load.origin} {load.destination} {load.distance} {load.status} {load.date}
); }; export default AdminDashboard;
